input: Evaluate metformin as a repurposing candidate for colorectal cancer prevention. Use all three strategies (target-based, disease-driven, compound-based).

expected_details.target_association: moderate (AMPK/mTOR pathway implicated in CRC; epidemiologic evidence of reduced CRC risk in diabetic patients on metformin)
expected_details.safety_profile: excellent (decades on market, well-tolerated, no boxed warnings relevant to CRC population)
expected_details.literature_evidence: strong retrospective/observational data; multiple RCTs ongoing but no definitive prospective result
expected_details.drug_properties: oral, generic, low cost — ideal repurposing profile

input: Evaluate thalidomide as a repurposing candidate for multiple myeloma. This is a historically validated repurposing success.

expected_details.target_association: strong (cereblon/CRBN binding → degradation of IKZF1/IKZF3 → myeloma cell death)
expected_details.safety_profile: significant concerns (teratogenicity, VTE, neuropathy) but manageable with REMS
expected_details.literature_evidence: prospective clinical trial evidence; FDA-approved for this indication

input: Evaluate sildenafil as a repurposing candidate for pulmonary arterial hypertension (PAH). Another validated success (Revatio).

expected_details.target_association: strong (PDE5 expressed in pulmonary vasculature; cGMP pathway directly relevant to vasodilation)
expected_details.safety_profile: well-characterized from erectile dysfunction use; favorable in PAH population

input: Evaluate aspirin as a repurposing candidate for colorectal cancer chemoprevention.

expected_details.target_association: strong (COX-2 pathway in colorectal carcinogenesis; prostaglandin-mediated tumor promotion)
expected_details.safety_profile: mixed — GI bleeding risk limits population-wide use; need careful risk-benefit for individual patients
expected_details.literature_evidence: multiple large prospective studies and meta-analyses (USPSTF conditional recommendation for select patients)

input: Evaluate hydroxychloroquine as a repurposing candidate for COVID-19 treatment. This is a FAILED repurposing attempt.

expected_details.target_association: weak (in vitro antiviral activity at concentrations unachievable in vivo)
expected_details.safety_profile: QT prolongation risk at higher doses; retinal toxicity with prolonged use
expected_details.literature_evidence: multiple large RCTs (RECOVERY, SOLIDARITY, ORCHID) showed NO benefit
should_note_failure_reasons: effective in vitro concentrations far exceed achievable plasma levels
expected_details.lesson: in vitro activity alone is insufficient for repurposing

input: Evaluate propranolol as a repurposing candidate for infantile hemangioma.

expected_details.target_association: moderate (beta-adrenergic signaling in vascular endothelial proliferation; mechanism not fully elucidated)
expected_details.safety_profile: well-characterized in pediatric population (decades of use for cardiac indications)
expected_details.literature_evidence: serendipitous discovery → case series → prospective RCTs → FDA approval (Hemangeol)

input: Evaluate minoxidil as a repurposing candidate for androgenetic alopecia (hair loss). Classic repurposing example.

expected_details.target_association: moderate (potassium channel opener → increased blood flow to follicles; exact mechanism for hair growth not fully understood)
expected_details.safety_profile: topical formulation minimizes systemic effects; well-tolerated

input: Evaluate ibuprofen as a repurposing candidate for Alzheimer's disease prevention.

expected_details.safety_profile: GI and CV risks limit long-term use in elderly AD-risk population
expected_details.literature_evidence: epidemiologic association (NSAID users had lower AD incidence) BUT prospective RCTs (ADAPT trial) failed to confirm benefit and showed harm
expected_details.lesson: observational association does not guarantee interventional benefit

input: Evaluate rapamycin (sirolimus) as a repurposing candidate for aging/longevity.

expected_details.target_association: strong preclinical (mTOR is the most validated aging pathway; lifespan extension in multiple model organisms)
expected_details.safety_profile: significant — immunosuppression, metabolic effects, impaired wound healing limit chronic use
expected_details.literature_evidence: strong preclinical; very limited human evidence (PEARL trial in elderly, small studies)
expected_details.regulatory_challenge: aging is not an FDA-recognized disease indication

input: Evaluate low-dose doxycycline as a repurposing candidate for periodontal disease (as MMP inhibitor, not antibiotic).

expected_details.target_association: moderate (matrix metalloproteinase inhibition at sub-antimicrobial doses)
expected_details.safety_profile: excellent at low dose (20mg) — below antimicrobial threshold, minimal GI/resistance concerns
expected_details.novel_mechanism: repurposed at different dose for different mechanism
